headline: Coinbase (COIN) Replaces Paul Grewal With Molly Abraham As Top Lawyer
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) announced that Chief Legal Officer and Secretary Paul Grewal will step down effective July 31, 2026. Molly Abraham, currently Vice President, Legal, has been appointed to succeed him as General Counsel. The transition comes as Coinbase expands into new markets and asset classes, including UK approval to offer stocks and derivatives. Coinbase Global operates at the intersection of digital assets and regulated financial services, where legal judgment and...
